name: Scourge of the White Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のあくま
desc: Tribute 1 Synchro Monster, then target 1 face-up card on the field; negate its effects (until the end of this turn), then if you Tributed a "White Forest" Synchro Monster to activate this effect, you can Special Summon 1 Illusion monster from your GY. If this card is sent to the GY to activate a monster effect: You can Set this card. You can only use each effect of "Scourge of the White Forest" once per turn.
eff: Tribute 1 Synchro Monster, then target 1 face-up card on the field; negate its effects (until the end of this turn), then if you Tributed a "White Forest" Synchro Monster to activate this effect, you can Special Summon 1 Illusion monster from your GY. If this card is sent to the GY to activate a monster effect: You can Set this card. You can only use each effect of "Scourge of the White Forest" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
